steps.title: Compute the cutoff values
steps.content:
For each listed $x$-value, compute the boundary value $5x+4$:
$$5(4)+4=24$$
$$5(6)+4=34$$
$$5(8)+4=44$$

steps.title: Compare the valid table
steps.content:
The valid table must have all three $y$-values strictly below those cutoffs. The values $20$, $30$, and $40$ work because:
$$20<24$$
$$30<34$$
$$40<44$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other tables
steps.content: The other tables include at least one value that is equal to or greater than its cutoff. The table with all three valid rows is the answer. The answer is C.
